runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Extended component scan to include the new PayPal payment package.
Renamed bean method to accurately reflect the AntiSamy filter it registers.
Added imports for new payment-related repositories to support deletion of payment data.
Injected RegistrationOrderRepository to enable deletion of registration orders.
Injected PaymentOptionsRepository to enable deletion of payment options.
Added deletion of payment options associated with the admin ID during dinner deletion.
Added deletion of registration orders associated with the admin ID during dinner deletion.
Added removal of team partner wish originator IDs from participants during dinner deletion.
Removed an unused repository query method that was not required for the application logic.
Added AfterPartyLocation parameter to createRunningDinner methods to support new feature.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Added logic to set AfterPartyLocation on the saved RunningDinner entity.
Added new method updateRunningDinnerAdminEmail to allow updating the admin email.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.after: public RunningDinner updateRunningDinnerAdminEmail(@ValidateAdminId String adminId, String newAdminEmail)

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Extracted save and URL generation logic into a protected helper method saveRunningDinner.
Changed visibility of emitRunningDinnerSettingsUpdatedEvent from private to protected.
Added import for java.util.Optional to support new return types.
Added imports for TeamTO and SLF4J Logger/LoggerFactory to support new functionality and logging.
Added constants for activity headlines to centralize string literals.

public static final String TEAM_HOST_CHANGED_BY_ADMIN_HEADLINE = "Gastgeber geändert";

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Extended the list of admin activity types to include waiting list operations.
Added message templates for after-party location edits and waiting list operations.
Added SLF4J Logger instance for logging warnings.
Added method to create activity for assigning waiting list participants to teams.
Added method to create activity for generating teams from the waiting list.
Refactored hardcoded headline string to use the new constant.
Changed return type of createActivityForMessageJobSendingFailed to Optional<Activity> to handle cases where no activity is created.
Added early return with Optional.empty() if the activity message is null.
Wrapped the saved activity in Optional.of() before returning.
Added handling for after-party location updates in the settings update event processing.
Refactored hardcoded headline string to use the new constant for team host changes.
Added utility method to check if a list of activities contains a specific activity type.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replaced throwing an IllegalArgumentException with logging a warning and returning null for unsupported message job types.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.after:

return null;

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Added inner class AffectedTeamsInfo to encapsulate team count and activity date logic.
Added new enum constants for waiting list activities.
Refactor message formatting to include RunningDinner context and deduplicate recipients to prevent duplicate emails.
Introduce deduplication logic for message tasks to ensure unique recipients.
Change sorting order of message tasks from ascending to descending.
Rename method to reflect specific event type (RunningDinnerCreated).
Add new formatter dependency for running dinner event creation messages.
Refactor team member retrieval for previews to include deduplication.
Replaced hardcoded magic number for message content length with a named constant from the BaseMessage class.
